name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated aging report extraction instead of manual tracking and reporting in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent and delayed accounts receivable aging reports
